summary: Comprehensive system check for ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE V29.1. Fixed critical bug in ApexCreatorConsole (Creator Console page). All navigation links work. Backend APIs healthy. Login flow functional.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'toLocaleString') - Missing SOVEREIGN_CONFIG.equity property

critical_code_review_comments: ApexCreatorConsole.js line 1629 was using SOVEREIGN_CONFIG.equity which didn't exist - added equity: 49018.24 to the config
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major navigation links work (Hub, Trade, Oracle, Discover, Mixer, Archives, Journal, Ledger). Creator Console was broken due to missing SOVEREIGN_CONFIG.equity - now fixed. SmartDock is hidden on certain pages (sovereign-hub, hub) by design. Emergency Stop button visible and accessible. Master Authority gating works - guests see 'V29.1 OPERATIONAL' instead of equity values.

pages.SovereignHub: PASS - loads correctly, shows V29.1 OPERATIONAL for guests
pages.CreatorConsole: PASS (after fix) - QU-32 interface displays correctly
pages.Auth: PASS - login form works with test credentials

components.MasterAuthorityGating: PASS - sensitive data hidden for non-master users

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Creator Console (/creator-console) showing error boundary 'A dimensional rift appeared'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: ApexCreatorConsole.js line 1629 was calling .toLocaleString() on SOVEREIGN_CONFIG.equity which was undefined. The SOVEREIGN_CONFIG object was missing the 'equity' property.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Creator Console now loads correctly and displays the QU-32 interface with equity value
